case_title: FARMER ELMER et al VS DAVIS DOROTHY

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $718.00 FILED BY FARMER ELMER FARMER ALMA AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS DOROTHY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-05-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-05-1991, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-09-1991 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FARMER ELMER FARMER ALMA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVIS DOROTHY $1,086.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,094.00, NONE $184 PER/MO FOR JUL-DEC 91, PLTF MUST PAY DEFT $28 AND ABIDE BY TERM OF SECTION 8 AGRMT AS TO PAYING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
JUDGEMENT CORRECTION NOTICE SENT TO M.LEE.
